Why It Works

Board games make tables earn more

The average diner stays 45 minutes. Add board games and they stay two hours, ordering the entire time. GameMaster Guide makes that possible without hiring game experts or managing inventory.

⏱️
Longer Sessions

Double the time at the table. Double the orders.

When guests are playing a game, they stay. Average sessions in our pilot hit 39 minutes with guests ordering food in under 8 minutes. Longer tables, more revenue, same square footage.

  • ✓Teaches any game instantly — setup, rules, strategy, mid-game questions
  • ✓Works on any device — guests use their own phones, no hardware to manage
  • ✓In-app F&B ordering — guests order without flagging down staff
  • ✓Zero game expertise required from your team
🔄
Repeat Visits

New games every month. New reasons to come back.

The game library rotates monthly. Customers can't play the same game next month because it's gone. This creates urgency to visit and a purchase trigger: buy your own copy before it disappears.

  • ✓Rotating monthly game library keeps the experience fresh
  • ✓28.6% of our pilot guests came back for a second event
  • ✓Love a game? Customers buy their own copy through the app
  • ✓Game sales create an additional revenue stream at no cost to you
📊
Zero Overhead

No new hires. No training. No hardware.

GameMaster Guide is software, not a staffing problem. Guests scan a QR code at the table and the app handles everything. You get a dashboard showing what's working and what customers are ordering.

  • ✓QR code at each table — guests scan and start playing
  • ✓191 questions answered automatically in our pilot — zero staff time
  • ✓Analytics dashboard: sessions, orders, popular games, dwell time
  • ✓Fixed monthly cost — no per-device or per-session charges
How It Works

Live in 30 days. Zero overhead.

We handle the setup. Guests use their own phones.

01

Guests scan a QR code at the table

Opens the app on their phone. No downloads, no hardware, no setup for your team.

→
02

Guests pick a game from the rotating library

New titles arrive monthly. Customers always have something fresh to try.

→
03

The app teaches them — voice-interactive, no staff needed

Setup, rules, strategy, mid-game questions. All handled by voice.

→
04

Guests order food and drinks without leaving the table

Integrated F&B menu. Tap, order, keep playing.

→
05

Loved the game? Buy it before next month's rotation

One-tap purchase through the app. The game ships or gets picked up locally.

Live Results

3 events. 91 guests. $677 in new orders.

We ran GameMaster Guide at a board game cafe in Las Vegas with over 30 unique games. Here's what happened when customers could teach themselves and order from the table.

Longer tables, more orders

Across just 3 events, 314 total sessions were logged with an average session of 39 minutes. Guests weren't just browsing — they were staying, playing, and ordering. 49 food and drink orders came through the app in under 8 minutes on average, generating $677.74 in net new revenue that wouldn't have existed without the game experience.

Games drive return visits

28.6% of visitors were returning guests — people who came back for a second or third event. With over 30 unique games played and 191 questions answered automatically, the app eliminated the need for dedicated game staff while keeping engagement high. Every question handled by the app is a question your team didn't have to field.

30+ Games Played 191 Questions Answered 49 Orders via App Zero Staff Training

The library rotates.
The urgency is real.

New games arrive each month. When a title rotates out, it's gone from the venue. Customers who love a game can buy their own copy through the app — before it disappears.

This isn't artificial scarcity. It's a genuinely fresh experience every visit, and a natural purchase trigger that drives game sales without any effort from your staff.

Feb Ticket to Ride · Everdell · Coup
Mar Root · Splendor · Dixit LIVE
Apr Cascadia · Pandemic · Quacks
Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

Per location. Month-to-month. Cancel anytime.

Starter
$149 /mo

Half a shelf — 10 games to get started

  • 10 games
  • Runs on any device — unlimited connections
  • Voice-interactive game teaching
  • F&B menu ordering
  • Score tracking
  • Basic analytics
Get Started
Standard
$299 /mo

A full shelf — everything to make it yours

  • 25 games
  • Runs on any device — unlimited connections
  • Everything in Starter, plus:
  • Custom venue branding
  • Staff Picks & Game of the Day
  • Game sales prompts (buy before rotation)
  • Detailed analytics dashboard
Get Started
Premium
$499 /mo

Two shelves — and teaches any game, even ones guests bring in

  • 50 games supplied + teaches any game
  • Runs on any device — unlimited connections
  • Everything in Standard, plus:
  • Guests scan & learn games they bring from home
  • Lobby sync across tables
  • Advanced analytics + export
  • Priority support + API access
